_backup_note: Snapshot of SyncView Calendar — Linear Status Sync (MJbMZ789B5ExZz9x) LIVE/ACTIVE version taken 2026-06-15, BEFORE lightening the per-event read (doc N8N_SAVE_LATENCY_AUDIT_2026-06-15.md): the 'Handle Linear Event' code node fetched ALL of a client's rows via the calendar-get webhook on every Linear state change; the edit swaps that for a targeted Supabase REST read (ilike on linear_issue_id/graphic_linear_issue_id, a superset of the strict word-boundary regex applied downstream, so the match is identical) with the full calendar-get kept as a fallback, plus 15s fail-fast timeouts on the Linear GraphQL + reads.
